ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the property in square feet */,
  "usecode" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Condominium, SingleFamily) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "zindex_value" INTEGER /* Z-index value of the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed for sale */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under contract) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent responsible for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent who handled the sale */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties of this type */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of properties of this type in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., bathrooms, bedrooms) */,
  "feature_value" INTEGER /* Value of the feature (e.g., number of bathrooms, number of bedrooms) */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., structural, amenity) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the value belongs to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value (e.g., finished square feet, total rooms) */,
  "value_value" INTEGER /* Value of the value (e.g., finished square feet, total rooms) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., size, count) */,
  "value_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_values" (
  "neighborhood_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood value */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the value belongs to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value (e.g., average price, number of properties) */,
  "value_value" INTEGER /* Value of the value (e.g., average price, number of properties) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., economic, demographic) */,
  "value_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_values_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the comparison belongs to */,
  "comparison_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison (e.g., price per square foot) */,
  "comparison_value" REAL /* Value of the comparison (e.g., price per square foot) */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., price, size) */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization type */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market trends, sales report) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
